overview.description: The CoinShares Bitcoin and Ether ETF (BTF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long cryptocurrency basket, short usd currency. The fund is actively managed, investing in a portfolio of CME Bitcoin and Ether Futures, treasuries, corporate bonds, and cash. The fund has no direct exposure to bitcoin or ether. BTF was launched on Oct 21, 2021 and is issued by CoinShares.
